DidacticResource.title: Didactic Resource
DidacticResource.description: Stores files, links, and documents for pedagogical support.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user information, roles, and institutional links.

settings.description: Custom flags and policies for the institution.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: A program of study (e.g., Engineering, High School).

Diagnostic.title: Diagnostic Result
Diagnostic.description: Stores the generated diagnostic for a student or group.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated this diagnostic.

aluno.description: The name of the student or group.

result.description: The full diagnostic result from Gemini.

Task.title: To-do Task
Task.description: A task in the user's to-do list.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this task.

updatedAt.description: When the task was last updated.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A message in the AI chat.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent or received this message.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

ClassDashboardStats.title: Class Dashboard Statistics
ClassDashboardStats.description: Aggregate statistics for a class dashboard.

Asset.title: Question Asset
Asset.description: Rich content for questions (code, image, diagram, table).

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A robust question with support for multiple types and rich content.

isAiGenerated.description: Whether the question was generated by AI.

questions.description: The list of questions in this exam.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created this exam.

difficulty.description: Overall difficulty level of the exam.

SimuladoForm.title: Simulado Form
SimuladoForm.description: Metadata for the external form linked to a simulado.

ImportedResponse.title: Imported Response
ImportedResponse.description: A response imported from an external form.

ResponseItem.title: Response Item
ResponseItem.description: Individual question response detail for an imported response.

ImportLog.title: Import Log
ImportLog.description: Log of a form response sync/import execution.

ImportInconsistency.title: Import Inconsistency
ImportInconsistency.description: A response that could not be automatically associated with a student.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A student's submission for an exam or exercise.

examId.description: The ID of the exam or exercise.

StudyPlan.title: Study Plan
StudyPlan.description: A personalized study plan for a student.

difficultyLevel.description: Intensity level of the study plan.

StudentExam.title: Student Exam
StudentExam.description: Relationship between a student and an exam.

status.description: The status of the exam for this student.

webhookUrl.description: Global webhook URL for N8N integration.

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who last updated the settings.

updatedAt.description: When the settings were last updated.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: A group of students for a specific subject/period.

ClassMembership.title: Class Membership
ClassMembership.description: Link between a student and a class.

Competencia.title: Competencia
Competencia.description: A competency linked to a discipline.

Habilidade.title: Habilidade
Habilidade.description: A skill linked to a competency.

BloomAnalysis.title: BloomAnalysis
BloomAnalysis.description: Analysis of exam balance based on Bloom's Taxonomy.

distribution.description: Percentage of questions per Bloom level.

SocraticSession.title: SocraticSession
SocraticSession.description: Session for the Socratic AI Tutor.

LearningProfile.title: Learning Profile
LearningProfile.description: Stores the student's learning style and cognitive profile.

AdaptiveSession.title: Adaptive Session
AdaptiveSession.description: Tracks an adaptive exam session with dynamic difficulty.

targetDifficulty.description: Target difficulty level for the session.

LessonPlan.title: Lesson Plan
LessonPlan.description: Stores AI-generated lesson plans based on class cognitive errors.

title.description: The title of the lesson plan.

RecoveryPlan.title: Recovery Plan
RecoveryPlan.description: Stores individualized recovery plans for students based on cognitive error analysis.

userId.description: The ID of the student this plan is for.

riskLevel.description: The risk level of the student.

CognitiveErrorAnalysis.title: Cognitive Error Analysis
CognitiveErrorAnalysis.description: Analysis of student errors by cognitive category.

PerformancePrediction.title: Performance Prediction
PerformancePrediction.description: AI-generated prediction of student performance in official exams.

AIProvider.title: AI Provider
AIProvider.description: Configuration for an AI provider like Gemini, OpenAI, Groq.

AIUsageLog.title: AI Usage Log
AIUsageLog.description: Logs every AI request for cost control and audit.

StudentPoint.title: Student Point
StudentPoint.description: Log of points gained by a student.

LabSubmission.title: Lab Submission
LabSubmission.description: Student delivery for a Practical Lab.

LearningDNA.description: Dynamic multidimensional profile of the student.

ContentRecommendation.title: Content Recommendation
ContentRecommendation.description: AI-curated external content for the student.

Activity.title: Pedagogical Activity
Activity.description: An activity created by a professor for students.

ActivitySubmission.title: Activity Submission
ActivitySubmission.description: A student's delivery for a pedagogical activity.

Rubric.title: Grading Rubric
Rubric.description: A set of criteria for grading activities.

LearningPath.title: Learning Path
LearningPath.description: A personalized trail of resources and activities.

StudentPortfolio.title: Student Portfolio
StudentPortfolio.description: A record of evidence and achievements.

CareerMatch.title: Career Match
CareerMatch.description: Alignment of student profile with market careers.

targetUserId.description: ID of the user this alert is about.

QuestionMetric.title: Question Metric
QuestionMetric.description: Analytics data for the question bank (Module 6).

content.description: JSON string of the template structure.

DidacticResource.title: Didactic Resource
DidacticResource.description: Educational materials like PDFs, videos, and links.

Quiz.title: Interactive Quiz
Quiz.description: Short, gamified quiz for quick diagnostic or review.

isLive.description: If active for real-time classroom participation.

QuizAttempt.title: Quiz Attempt
QuizAttempt.description: Student result for a specific quiz.

Simulator.title: Practical Simulator
Simulator.description: Interative simulator for technical or professional scenarios.

PracticalLab.title: Practical Lab
PracticalLab.description: Comprehensive practical experience session created by teachers.

/student_exams/{studentExamId}.description: Tracks exams assigned to or taken by students.

/student_points/{pointId}.description: Log of points gained by a student.

/system_events/{eventId}.description: System audit and event log documents.

/question_metrics/{metricId}.description: Analytics data for the question bank (Module 6).
